docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: PLANTIFF'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HYON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF HYON LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH BURKE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS TRUDY FISHER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HYON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURKE, JOSEPH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,170.00, BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED IN COURT AND THE APPLICATION OF CVC 21803, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. FILED BY LEE, HYON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED SEP-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURKE, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2022 - CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM TO NOV-30-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HYON LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH BURKE IS PRESENT. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, HYON AS TO DEFENDANT BURKE, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2022 - JUDGMENT.
